title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netmeds - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netmeds - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Netmeds invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Netmeds:
Netmeds is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds!
